cover.headline: YOUR AI WORKS WHILE YOU SLEEP.

paragraphs: Most people won't tell you the number that doesn't make the ROI deck.
Autonomous agents without guardrails are hitting 50% cloud overspend in 2026. Anthropic just shipped the answer.
Send a task at 9pm. Go to sleep. Wake up to finished work.
CI fails at 2am — Claude gets the Discord alert, fixes it, sends you a summary. You're still asleep.

slides.bold_line: Speed without guardrails is just expensive chaos.
paragraphs: Agents without financial controls hit 50% cloud overspend in 2026. ClawWorm infected 40,000+ instances via one group chat.
Before you deploy: task-level spend limits. Job-level permission isolation. Real-time execution logs. In that order.
Ask yourself: who approves each agent action? Who sees the logs in real time? If you don't have answers — you're not ready to scale.

slides.bold_line: The ClawWorm attack — how it spreads.
paragraphs: Web injection: 100% propagation rate. Supply chain poisoning: 98%. One group chat message — no admin access needed.
I broke down the full Channels + Dispatch framework — how to set it up, what guardrails to put in place, and where teams get burned.
Full research in the article. Link in bio.
